title: Build vs Buy Platform Decision
subtitle: A structured comparison of two delivery options

compositionDecision.rationale: The source compares two options across shared criteria and ends with a recommendation.

alternatives.reason: Use if the decision is mostly KPI-driven.

summary: Buying accelerates launch while building gives long-term control; the recommendation depends on urgency and integration risk.

items.label: Build
items.text: Best when differentiation and integration control matter most.

items.label: Buy
items.text: Best when launch speed and vendor support matter most.
Buy now to meet the launch deadline, then revisit build once usage patterns stabilize.
